positive: A celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) sitting gracefully among swirling nebulas and cosmic floral patterns. The fox has luminous, ethereal fur painted in shades of deep indigo, sapphire blue, and metallic gold. Its tail is a flowing river of stardust, intertwining with geometric cosmic motifs, constellations, and stylized cherry blossom blooms (sakura). The overall aesthetic is sacred, magical, and elegant, designed as a centralized mandala composition suitable for a shirt print. Strong contrast between the dark, space-like background and the brilliant luminosity of the fox and flowers. Deep focus, fine line work, symmetrical balance, high contrast color palette of blues, golds, and violets. Vector illustration style, Art Nouveau influence, psychedelic tapestry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, low resolution, cropped, bad anatomy, multiple figures, extra limbs, noisy, jpeg artifacts, messy, unreadable
